creator: ghostonthewire@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Kubilay Kocak from comment #2)

Hello,

Stumbled upon this PR while opening new to submit patch to recent version (https://github.com/restic/restic/tree/v0.3.3) released a day ago.

Changes:

- Update port to version 0.3.3
- Use Mk/Uses/go.mk infrastructure, BUILD_DEPENDS and custom targets are
  no longer needed
- Remove GH_TUPLE as all vendor dependencies are now bundled with
  release
- Add LICENSE
- Unbroke port

Poudriere (10.3, 11.0, amd64/i386) logs, portlint output – https://gist.github.com/ghostonthewire/b55defa6f2b6db0d9bec7af77411724d.

Patch is in comment #4.
